cards.title: Exercise Physiology & Sports Nutrition
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • VO2max estimation: 220-age formula, Bruce protocol
  • Training zones: % HRmax, RPE scale
  • Pre-exercise: CHO loading, hydration (500mL 2h before)
  • Post-exercise recovery: Protein within 30 min, tart cherry

cards.title: Ergogenic Aids & Injury Recovery
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Evidence-based ergogenics: Creatine 5g/day, Beta-alanine, caffeine
  • Anti-doping basics: WADA prohibited list
  • Injury recovery: Collagen + Vitamin C 30min pre-exercise
  • RED-S (Relative Energy Deficiency in Sport): LEA assessment
